name: Penggali Kubur dan Miss Sleepwalker
overview:
Asyraf is an undertaker, a profession that is considered taboo in society and requires great courage.

One night, when Asyraf was digging the grave for someone who had just passed away in his village, a strange and terrifying incident happened. He felt nervous when he saw a girl dressed in white hovering around the cemetery. Is this girl human or ghost?

trailers.title: Penggali Kubur dan Miss Sleepwalker | Trailer
